core_concept: 融合科幻與神秘元素的生物設計，體現 SCP 基金會的異質宇宙
composition_hint: 以對角線構圖強調生物與科技的融合，前景突出核心能量源，中景展示生物結構，背景融入數據流與異質宇宙元素
potential_subjects: Cybernetic SCP Creature with Glowing Neural Network
Ethereal Being with Data Stream Appendages
Mecha-Organic Hybrid Entity in Apocalyptic Setting
original_excerpt:
Welcome to the Essay and Resource Hub!
The Essay and Resource Hub is the centralized location for informational pages written by members of the SCP community. Unlike the
Guide Hub
, the following articles are not considered required reading or official advice, but may still be interesting or useful.
Unlike the “
guide
” tag, the “
essay
” or “
resource
” tags can be added by authors to their own works, which you can then add here in the appropriate section (list works in alphabetical order). Ess
